title: Aid
description: When you **help someone who has not yet rolled**

outcomes.text: The GM picks 1. Regardless, you are exposed to any risk, cost, or consequence associated with their roll
bullets: They can accomplish more than they could alone.
They gain advantage on their roll.

title: Clash (+Strength)
description: When you **fight in melee or close quarters**, roll +STR:

outcomes.text: Your maneuver works as expected (deal your damage) and pick 1:
bullets: Avoid, prevent, or counter your enemy's attack
Strike hard and fast, for 1d6 extra damage, but suffer your enemy's attack

outcomes.text: Your maneuver works, mostly (deal your damage) but you suffer your enemy's attack
